dashboard.financialOverview: Here is your financial overview for today.

accounts.title: Accounts
accounts.noDepositAccountsDesc: No deposit accounts found for your profile.
accounts.noFees: No fees or charges on this account.
accounts.earlyWithdrawalWarning: Early withdrawal before {{date}} may result in a penalty. Contact us for details.
accounts.noTransactionsFilter: No transactions match the current filter.

transfer.title: Transfer Funds
transfer.pageSubtitle: Send money between your accounts or to a beneficiary.
transfer.successMessage: Your transfer of {{amount}} has been completed.
transfer.sameAccountError: Source and destination must be different
transfer.chooseDestination: Choose where to send the money.
transfer.noStandingInstructionsDesc: Recurring transfers will appear here once created.
transfer.cancelInstructionDesc: This will permanently cancel the recurring transfer. This action cannot be undone.

billPay.title: Bill Pay
billPay.subtitle: Manage payees and schedule payments.
billPay.searchBillersDesc: Search for a biller and add them to your payee list.
billPay.yourAccountNumber: Your Account Number with this Biller
billPay.noPayeesEnrolledDesc: Add a payee to start scheduling payments.
billPay.noRecentPaymentsDesc: Your payment history will appear here.

deposit.title: Deposit Check
deposit.subtitle: Capture images of your check to deposit remotely.
deposit.frontOfCheckDesc: Take a clear photo of the front of the check.
deposit.backOfCheckDesc: Sign and take a photo of the back of the check.
deposit.depositSuccessMessage: Your check deposit of {{amount}} is being processed.
deposit.holdNotice: Funds may be subject to a hold period.
deposit.endorsementRequired: Please endorse the back of your check.
deposit.depositSubmittedDesc: Your check for {{amount}} has been submitted for deposit into {{account}}.
deposit.captureErrorDesc: Unable to read the selected image. Please try again.

cards.title: Cards
cards.pageSubtitle: Manage your debit and credit cards.
cards.noCardsDesc: No debit or credit cards are linked to your account.
cards.lockThisCardDesc: Your card will be temporarily disabled. You can unlock it at any time from this page.

cardServices.title: Card Services
cardServices.subtitle: Manage travel notices and card replacements.
cardServices.travelNoticeDesc: Notify us before you travel to avoid card blocks.
cardServices.noTravelNoticesDesc: Create a notice before your next trip.
cardServices.newTravelNoticeDesc: Let us know where and when you will be traveling.
cardServices.cancelTravelNoticeDesc: This will deactivate the travel notice. You can create a new one at any time.
cardServices.noticeCreatedDesc: Your travel notice has been registered.
cardServices.replacementDesc: Request a new card if yours is lost, stolen, or damaged.
cardServices.noReplacementsDesc: You have not requested any card replacements.
cardServices.requestCardReplacementDesc: We will send you a new card. Lost or stolen cards will be locked immediately.
cardServices.lostStolenWarning: Your current card will be locked immediately. Fraud will be reported automatically.
cardServices.replacementRequestedDesc: Your replacement card has been ordered.
cardServices.activateNewCardDesc: Enter the last 4 digits of your new card to verify and activate it.
cardServices.cardActivatedDesc: Your new card is ready to use.

cardOffers.title: Card-Linked Offers
cardOffers.subtitle: Activate personalized cashback and discount offers for your card.
cardOffers.noAvailable: No offers available right now. Check back soon!
cardOffers.noActivated: No offers activated yet. Browse available offers to get started.
cardOffers.offerActivatedDesc: The offer has been linked to your card.
cardOffers.noRewards: No rewards earned yet. Activate offers and make qualifying purchases.

statements.title: Statements
statements.subtitle: View and download your account statements.
statements.selectAccountPlaceholder: Choose an account to view statements
statements.selectAccountPrompt: Select an account to view statements.
statements.noStatementsDesc: No statements are available for this account yet.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.noNotificationsDesc: You're all caught up! Notifications will appear here.

secureMessages.title: Secure Messages
secureMessages.newSecureMessageDesc: Send a message to our support team. We typically respond within 1 business day.
secureMessages.subject: Subject
secureMessages.noMessagesDesc: Start a conversation with our support team.

disputes.title: Transaction Disputes
disputes.subtitle: File and track Reg E transaction disputes
disputes.fileDisputeDesc: Select the transaction and provide details about your dispute.
disputes.disputeFiledDesc: Your dispute has been submitted for review.
disputes.disputeFileFailed: Failed to file dispute. Please try again.
disputes.noDisputesHint: If you see an unauthorized or incorrect transaction, file a dispute above.

linkedAccounts.title: Linked Accounts
linkedAccounts.recentActivity: Recent activity across all linked accounts

findUs.title: Find ATM & Branch
findUs.subtitle: Locate nearby ATMs and branches.
findUs.geolocationNotSupported: Geolocation is not supported by your browser.
findUs.locationDenied: Location permission denied. Please enable location in your browser settings.
findUs.expandSearch: Try expanding your search or changing the filter.

stopPayments.title: Stop Payments
stopPayments.subtitle: Manage stop payment orders on checks
stopPayments.reasonPlaceholder: Why are you stopping this check?
stopPayments.noStopPaymentsDesc: You have no stop payment orders.
stopPayments.cancelStopPaymentDesc: This will release the stop payment order. The check may then be processed normally.
stopPayments.createdDesc: Your stop payment order is now active.
stopPayments.cancelledDesc: The stop payment order has been released.

wireTransfer.title: Wire Transfers
wireTransfer.subtitle: Send domestic and international wire transfers
wireTransfer.newWireTransferDesc: Complete the form below to send a wire transfer
wireTransfer.noWiresDesc: Your wire transfer history will appear here.
wireTransfer.cancelWireTransferDesc: This will cancel the pending wire transfer. This action cannot be undone.
wireTransfer.wireInitiatedDesc: Your wire transfer has been submitted for processing.
wireTransfer.wireCancelledDesc: The wire transfer has been cancelled.

moveMoney.title: Move Money
moveMoney.subtitle: Transfer funds, pay bills, or deposit a check.

transfer.label: Transfer
transfer.description: Move money between your accounts or to someone else.

bills.label: Pay Bills
bills.description: Pay your bills and manage payees.

deposit.label: Deposit Check
deposit.description: Deposit a check using your camera.

financialManagement.title: Financial Insights
financialManagement.subtitle: Track your spending, budgets, and net worth across all accounts.
financialManagement.monthlyTrendsDesc: Spending, income, and savings over the last 6 months
financialManagement.budgetsDesc: Track spending against your category budgets

financialLiteracy.title: Financial Education
financialLiteracy.subtitle: Curated resources and a glossary to help you make informed financial decisions.
financialLiteracy.searchResourcesPlaceholder: Search resources by title or description...
financialLiteracy.noResources: No resources match your search criteria.
financialLiteracy.noTerms: No glossary terms match your search.

spendingAlerts.title: Spending Alerts
spendingAlerts.subtitle: Set up alerts to monitor your spending and balances
spendingAlerts.configureNotification: Configure when you want to be notified
spendingAlerts.name: Name

overdraftSettings.title: Overdraft Protection
overdraftSettings.subtitle: Manage overdraft settings for your accounts
overdraftSettings.selectAccountDesc: Choose an account to configure overdraft protection
overdraftSettings.enableProtectionDesc: Prevent declined transactions when your balance is low
overdraftSettings.linkedAccountTransferDesc: Automatically transfer funds from another account
overdraftSettings.lineOfCreditDesc: Draw from an overdraft line of credit
overdraftSettings.courtesyPayDesc: Cover transactions up to a set limit (fees may apply)
overdraftSettings.optIntoFeesDesc: Allow overdraft fees for ATM and one-time debit transactions
overdraftSettings.overdraftHistoryDesc: Recent overdraft events for this account

jitPermissions.title: Just-in-Time Permissions
jitPermissions.subtitle: Real-time approval workflow. No more rigid permission hierarchies.
jitPermissions.approvalPoliciesDesc: Define when approval is required and who can approve
jitPermissions.allRequestsDesc: Complete history of approval requests and outcomes
jitPermissions.noRequestsYetDesc: When team members exceed their limits, requests will appear here.
jitPermissions.noPolicies: No policies configured. Add one to enable JIT permissions.
jitPermissions.createApprovalPolicyDesc: Define when team members need approval to proceed.
jitPermissions.toastApprovedDesc: {{name}}'s {{action}} request approved. Limit updated in real-time.

kycAml.title: KYC/AML Compliance
kycAml.subtitle: Identity verification, watchlist screening, and ongoing monitoring

screening.dialogDescription: Screen an individual or organization against OFAC, UN, EU sanctions, PEP lists, and adverse media databases.
screening.noRecentScreeningsDesc: Click "New Screening" to screen a customer against OFAC, UN, EU sanctions, PEP lists, and adverse media.

monitoring.title: Ongoing Monitoring (Perpetual KYC/AML)
monitoring.description: Active subscriptions that automatically re-screen customers against global watchlists to prevent risk from stale data.
monitoring.noActiveDesc: Enable "ongoing monitoring" when screening a customer to set up perpetual AML checks.

alerts.title: Monitoring Alerts
alerts.noAlertsDesc: All clear. You will be notified when monitoring detects changes.
alerts.reviewAlertDescription: Determine whether this match is a true positive or false positive.

openBanking.title: Connected Apps & Services
openBanking.subtitle: Manage third-party access to your financial data. You can revoke access at any time.
openBanking.section1033Notice: Under CFPB Section 1033, you have the right to control which third parties can access your financial data. You can revoke any connection at any time with one click.
openBanking.noConnectedServicesDesc: When you connect a third-party app to your account, it will appear here.
openBanking.revokeAccessDescription: This will immediately disconnect the third-party service from your account. They will no longer be able to access your financial data. This action cannot be undone.

automationRules.title: Smart Automations
automationRules.subtitle: Create rules in plain English and let AI handle the rest.
automationRules.createSmartAutomationDesc: Describe what you want to automate in plain English. The AI will interpret your rule and execute it automatically.
automationRules.rulePlaceholder: e.g. Round up every purchase to the nearest dollar and save the difference
automationRules.ruleExamples: Examples: "Transfer $50 to savings every Friday" or "Alert me when my checking balance drops below $200"
automationRules.noAutomationsYetDesc: Create your first smart automation to let AI manage routine tasks for you.
automationRules.ruleCreatedDesc: Your smart automation is now active.

cashSweeps.title: Smart Cash Sweeps
cashSweeps.subtitle: Automated yield optimization. Stop leaving money on the table.
cashSweeps.sweepRulesDesc: Configure automatic cash movements between accounts
cashSweeps.executionHistoryDesc: Automatic sweep transactions performed by your rules
cashSweeps.noRulesYetDesc: Create your first rule to start optimizing idle cash automatically.
cashSweeps.createSweepRuleDesc: Set up automatic cash movement when account balances exceed a threshold.
cashSweeps.sweepIn: Sweep In (top up source from destination)

checkOrdering.title: Order Checks
checkOrdering.subtitle: Choose a check design and place your order.
checkOrdering.noOrders: No check orders yet. Browse designs to get started.
checkOrdering.missingSelectionDesc: Please select a check design and account.
checkOrdering.orderPlacedDesc: Your check order has been submitted.
checkOrdering.orderFailedDesc: Unable to place your check order. Please try again.
checkOrdering.orderCancelledDesc: Your check order has been cancelled.
checkOrdering.cancelFailedDesc: Unable to cancel your order. Please try again.

regulatory.title: Regulatory Transparency
regulatory.subtitle: Fund safeguarding, tax withholding, and carbon footprint — always one tap away

safeguarding.fundsProtectedDesc: All funds are held in segregated accounts at regulated custodian banks. Each currency pot is protected by the relevant national deposit guarantee scheme.
safeguarding.noDataDesc: Safeguarding information is not available for your region.

withholding.noEntriesDesc: No interest withholding tax entries found.
withholding.ledgerDescription: Line-by-line breakdown of interest payments and tax withheld

carbon.noDataDesc: Carbon tracking data is not yet available.
carbon.countryAverage: Country average: {{avg}} kg CO₂ · You: {{percent}}% of average
carbon.emissionsByCategoryDesc: Breakdown of your carbon footprint by spending category

deviceManagement.title: Devices
deviceManagement.subtitle: Manage devices that have access to your account.
deviceManagement.noDevicesDesc: No devices are registered to your account.
deviceManagement.renameDeviceDesc: Give this device a recognizable name.
deviceManagement.removeDeviceConfirmDesc: This will deregister the device and revoke all active sessions on it. The next login from this device will require full authentication.
deviceManagement.deviceRemovedDesc: All sessions on this device have been revoked.
deviceManagement.trustRemovedDesc: MFA will be required on next login from this device.
deviceManagement.deviceTrustedDesc: MFA will be skipped for 30 days on this device.

documentVault.title: Document Vault
documentVault.subtitle: Securely store and manage your important documents
documentVault.uploadDocumentDesc: Add a new document to your secure vault
documentVault.name: Name

jointAccounts.title: Joint Account Management
jointAccounts.subtitle: Manage shared access and joint owners on your accounts.
jointAccounts.pendingInvitationsDesc: Invitations you have sent or received
jointAccounts.accountOwnersDesc: Select an account to view and manage its owners
jointAccounts.noOwnersFoundDesc: This account does not have any joint owners yet.
jointAccounts.addJointOwnerDesc: Send an invitation to add a new joint owner to this account.
jointAccounts.updatePermissionsDesc: Choose the access level for this joint owner.
jointAccounts.removeJointOwnerDesc: {{name}} will lose access to this account. This action cannot be undone.
jointAccounts.invitationSentDesc: An invitation has been sent to {{email}}.
jointAccounts.ownerRemovedDesc: {{name}} has been removed from the account.
jointAccounts.invitationAcceptedDesc: You have been added to the account.
